title: MMDS — Machine-Mediated Diagram Specification
description: Structured JSON output for graph-family Mermaid diagrams produced by mmdflux.

version.description: Integer schema version. Incremented on breaking MMDS changes.

profiles.description: Optional behavior bundles used for profile negotiation (for example 'mmds-core-v1', 'mmdflux-svg-v1', or 'mmdflux-node-style-v1').

propertyNames.description: Namespaced extension key ending with '.v{number}', for example 'org.mmdflux.render.svg.v1'.

extensions.description: Optional namespaced extension payloads keyed by versioned namespace ID.

defaults.description: Document-level defaults for omitted node/edge fields.

geometry_level.description: Geometry detail level. 'layout' includes node geometry + edge topology only. 'routed' adds edge paths, bounds, and routing metadata.

activations.description: Sequence diagram activation bars (timeline family only).

blocks.description: Sequence diagram interaction frames (timeline family only).

participant_boxes.description: Sequence diagram participant groupings (timeline family only).

shape.description: Default node shape used when a node omits the shape field.

stroke.description: Default edge stroke used when an edge omits stroke.

arrow_start.description: Default source-end marker used when an edge omits arrow_start.

arrow_end.description: Default target-end marker used when an edge omits arrow_end.

minlen.description: Default minimum rank separation used when an edge omits minlen.

bounds.description: Overall diagram canvas extents in unitless MMDS coordinate space. In current mmdflux output, values are SVG-pixel-aligned. Not guaranteed to be a tight content bounding box.

engine.description: Engine+algorithm identifier that produced this output (e.g., 'flux-layered', 'mermaid-layered'). Present when the output was produced via the solve pipeline.

shape.description: Shape name in snake_case. If omitted, consumers should use defaults.node.shape.

position.description: Node center position in unitless MMDS coordinate space, not top-left anchor. In current mmdflux output, values are SVG-pixel-aligned.

size.description: Node bounding box dimensions in unitless MMDS coordinate space. In current mmdflux output, values are SVG-pixel-aligned.

id.description: Deterministic edge identifier (e.g., 'e0', 'e1') in declaration order.

from_subgraph.description: Original source subgraph ID when this edge represented a subgraph-as-source endpoint intent.

to_subgraph.description: Original target subgraph ID when this edge represented a subgraph-as-target endpoint intent.

stroke.description: Stroke style. If omitted, consumers should use defaults.edge.stroke.

arrow_start.description: Arrow at source end. If omitted, consumers should use defaults.edge.arrow_start.

arrow_end.description: Arrow at target end. If omitted, consumers should use defaults.edge.arrow_end.

minlen.description: Minimum rank separation. If omitted, consumers should use defaults.edge.minlen.

path.description: Authoritative visible routed edge path as [x, y] coordinate pairs in unitless MMDS coordinate space. Consumers should use this path for visible edge shape and endpoints. In current mmdflux output, values are SVG-pixel-aligned. Routed level only.

label_position.description: Label center position in unitless MMDS coordinate space. In current mmdflux output, values are SVG-pixel-aligned. Routed level only.

is_backward.description: Whether this edge flows backward in the layout direction. Routed level only.

source_port.description: Logical source port anchor metadata describing route intent. This may differ from the visible path endpoint. Routed level only.

target_port.description: Logical target port anchor metadata describing route intent. This may differ from the visible path endpoint. Routed level only.

label_side.description: Label side relative to the edge. Appears at both layout and routed geometry levels when the engine assigned a side; omitted otherwise.

label_rect.description: Padded label rectangle in MMDS coordinate space. Includes label_padding_x / label_padding_y on each side. Routed level only.

children.description: IDs of nodes directly in this subgraph.

bounds.description: Subgraph bounding box. Routed level only.

face.description: Logical node boundary face for route intent.

fraction.description: Fractional position along the face (0.0 = start, 1.0 = end). For top/bottom faces, 0.0 is left and 1.0 is right. For left/right faces, 0.0 is top and 1.0 is bottom.

position.description: Logical anchor coordinate derived from face, fraction, and node bounds in MMDS coordinate space. Not guaranteed to equal the visible path endpoint.

group_size.description: Number of edges attached to this face of this node.

nodes.description: Node-ID keyed style overrides replayed into renderer-visible node fill/stroke/text colors.

layout_mode.description: Materialized view layout policy. V1 preserves canonical shared coordinates.

boundary_policy.description: Materialized view boundary policy. V1 omits edges connected to nodes outside the view.

ViewExtension.description: Marker for MMDS payloads materialized by the Rust views API.

fill.description: Raw color token for node fill.

stroke.description: Raw color token for node border stroke.

color.description: Raw color token for node label text.

x.description: X coordinate in unitless MMDS coordinate space. In current mmdflux output, values are SVG-pixel-aligned.

y.description: Y coordinate in unitless MMDS coordinate space. In current mmdflux output, values are SVG-pixel-aligned.

width.description: Width in unitless MMDS coordinate space. In current mmdflux output, values are SVG-pixel-aligned.

height.description: Height in unitless MMDS coordinate space. In current mmdflux output, values are SVG-pixel-aligned.

width.description: Overall width in unitless MMDS coordinate space. In current mmdflux output, values are SVG-pixel-aligned.

height.description: Overall height in unitless MMDS coordinate space. In current mmdflux output, values are SVG-pixel-aligned. Consumers should preserve width/height aspect ratio when scaling.

label.description: Display label (alias if provided, otherwise id).

lifeline_x.description: Center x of the vertical lifeline.

participants.description: Participant indices the note relates to.
